use_cases: Landing page hero section with animated particle background
Premium product showcase introduction with sophisticated visuals
Modern SaaS website header with interactive elements
Portfolio or creative agency landing page entrance
Tech startup homepage with elegant visual effects
ai_summary: A particle animation hero component featuring floating particles that rise and fade in/out using HTML5 Canvas for performant rendering. The component includes a toggleable gold mode for premium aesthetics, making it ideal for creating engaging landing pages and SaaS product showcases with a modern, sophisticated feel.
